hyperedges.label: Phase A no-op default ports for tick pipeline seams

hyperedges.rationale: All three concrete adapters implement the SnapshotStorePort interface.
ManualClock and SystemClock both implement the WallClock port; ManualClock for tests, SystemClock for production.
Three deterministic ports that together form the determinism contract enforced across the agent core.

hyperedges.label: default active skill bundle (FeedSkill, CleanSkill, PlaySkill, RestSkill, ScoldSkill, PetSkill, MedicateSkill all implement Skill and ship in defaultPetInteractionModule)
expression skill family (Meow/Sad/Sleepy share createExpressionSkill factory and emit ExpressionEmitted events)
need-satisfying skills (FeedSkill, PetSkill, PlaySkill, RestSkill all call satisfyNeed via SkillContext to alter homeostatic needs)
review-fix end-to-end pipeline (prompt â†’ skill â†’ workflow)
Pre-1.0 polish + harden multi-track program (remediation, CI, demo, lib seams)
tfjs learning-mode arc (adapter â†’ learner â†’ softmax â†’ richer features â†’ prediction strip)
